title: potentilla thuringiaca subsp. nestleriana
intro: Potentilla thuringiaca subsp. nestleriana, also known as Potentilla nestleriana, is a flowering plant species within the rose family Rosaceae. It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and relief from gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, Potentilla nestleriana is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies.
